name: player_rankings_history
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2026]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."avg" AS "average_rank_0", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."overall_rank" AS "overall_rank_0", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."position_rank" AS "position_rank_0", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."min" AS "min_rank_0", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."max" AS "max_rank_0", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."std" AS "rank_stddev_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "player_rankings_index" as "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b" on "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."season_year" = 2026 and "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."source_id" in ('FANTASYPROS') and "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."ranking_type" in ('PPR_REDRAFT') where te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b.avg <= '50' group by "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."avg", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."overall_rank", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."position_rank", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."min", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."max", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."std", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 2 ASC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
